assessment_objectives.objective: unsanctioned information to be detected is defined.
cybersecurity / data privacy policy that requires the transfer of unsanctioned information between different security domains to be prohibited is defined.
when transferring information between different security domains, information is examined for the presence of organization-defined unsanctioned information.

when transferring information between different security domains, transfer of organization-defined unsanctioned information is prohibited in accordance with the organization-defined cybersecurity / data privacy policy.
